description: Push notification configuration is used to integrate with mobile push notification service. Supports Apple APNS and Android Firebase providers.

app_id.description: The application identifier associated with the registration.

platform.description: The platform the registration is for.

provider_address.description: The host:port address of the push notification service provider.

apple_key_store.description: The key store database containing the APNS certificate. Only valid if 'platform' is 'apple'.

apple_key_label.description: The key label of the imported APNS certificate. Only valid if 'platform' is 'apple'.

firebase_server_key.description: The server key for access to the Firebase push notification service. Only valid if 'platform' is 'android'.

imc_client_id.description: The IBM Marketing Cloud issued Oauth client ID.

imc_client_secret.description: The IBM Marketing Cloud issued Oauth client secret.

imc_refresh_token.description: The IBM Marketing Cloud issued Oauth refresh token.

imc_app_key.description: The app key issued by IBM Marketing Cloud for the associated application.
